name: Herbag cloth handbag
description:
Recent photos show the bag is in the same condition as pictured. Warehouse number: LBMP90. Minor scratches, stains, creases, and dents may exist on the exterior, interior lining, hardware, and bottom edge of the bag. Please refer to the photos for details. All photos were taken in actual conditions and include accompanying accessories.

Before the bag is shipped, our professional department will provide a free care and cleaning service to ensure it arrives in perfect condition. This includes, but is not limited to, repairing worn areas and polishing the hardware. All services will be completed before shipment. Rest assured, these services will not affect the bag's functionality.

Please note: Due to differences in light and monitors, the color of this item may vary slightly.

If you have any questions or require a quote, please feel free to contact us. Happy shopping!

Hermes herbag 31 Silver Buckle Red Canvas and Leather Handbag/Shoulder Bag Dimensions: 31-10-25cm
